## Proposed solution

<!-- What should change (tools, behavior, docs)? Be concrete. -->

## Fit with the project paradigm

Matryca is intentionally **local-first**, **database-free** (no Postgres/Redis/SQLite as system-of-record), and **Logseq OG–native** (Markdown blocks, `id::`, journals, Advanced Query).

- [ ] This proposal keeps data on disk / in Logseq and does not require a hosted DB or cloud sync as a dependency for core behavior.
- [ ] This proposal respects the **outliner** model (blocks, nesting) rather than turning pages into unstructured blobs.
